fixed.description: Resolve gosec G703 path traversal warning in schema generator
Upgrade to golangci-lint-action@v9 for v2 config support

documentation.description: Add README badges for Go Reference, CI, and license
Add MIT LICENSE file for pkg.go.dev indexing

highlights.description: Declarative specification framework for defining complete design systems as machine-readable, LLM-optimized code
Go SDK with types for 9 canonical layers: Meta, Principles, Foundations, Components, Patterns, Templates, Content, Accessibility, Governance

added.description: Go SDK (`sdk/go`) as nested module with complete type system
`Meta` type for system metadata (name, version, maturity, maintainers)
`Principles` type for design philosophy and brand values
`Foundations` type for design tokens: colors, typography, spacing, elevation, motion, grid, breakpoints, borders, opacity, z-index
`Component` type with variants, states, props, slots, and constraints
`Pattern` type for multi-component UX solutions with layouts
`Template` type for page-level layouts with regions
`Content` type for voice, tone, terminology, and microcopy guidelines
`Accessibility` type for WCAG requirements, keyboard, and screen reader support
`Governance` type for versioning, contribution, and deprecation policies
`LLMContext` type for AI code generation optimization (intent, allowed/forbidden contexts, anti-patterns)
`LoadDesignSystem()` for loading specs from JSON/YAML files or directory structures
Schema generator tool (`tools/generate`) producing JSON Schema files from Go types
Generated JSON schemas for all layers in `schema/` directory
Makefile with targets: build, test, generate-schema, verify-schema, lint-schema

documentation.description: README with installation, quick start, canonical layers reference, and LLM optimization guide
Product Requirements Document (PRD.md) with problem statement, requirements, and roadmap
Implementation tasks tracking (TASKS.md) for all 5 phases

tests.description: Unit tests for DesignSystem validation, JSON serialization, and schema generation
